title: rubus × angustarum
intro: Rubus × angustarum, also known as the black raspberry, is a hybrid plant species of the Rubus genus, resulting from the cross between the black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis) and the red raspberry (Rubus idaeus). The medicinal properties of Rubus × angustarum include its high antioxidant and anti-inflammatory content, which can help protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation in the body. The health benefits of consuming Rubus × angustarum include supporting heart health, reducing the risk of certain cancers, and alleviating symptoms of menopausal hot flashes. Rubus × angustarum can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as tea, juice, and jam, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
